Employee Life Insurance Coverage: Increments of $10,000 to a Maximum of $300,000
Spouse Life Insurance Coverage: Minimum Amount of $5.000 and Increments of $5,000 to a maximum of $60,000
Child(ren) Life Insurance Coverage: Ages 14 Days to 6 Months Minimum of $2,500 and Increments of $2,500 to a maximum of $10,000, Ages 6 Months to 26 Years Minimum of S2,500 and Increments of $2,500 to a maximum of $10.000
Age Reduction Schedule: 35% at age 70 / 55% at age 75 / 70% at age 80 / 80% at age 85
Guaranteed Insurability: Member: $150,000 / Spouse: $50,000 / Child: There is no guaranteed issue. All amounts are approved
